---
reference: inspect_ai.input
description: Structured `ask_user` interactions, handlers, and notifiers.
---

## Functions

### request_input

## Types

### InputConfig
### InputRequest
### InputResult
### InputNotification
### InputHandler
### InputNotifier
### InputOutcome

## Config

### InputConfigSpec
### InputHandlerSpec
### InputNotifierSpec

## Decorators

### input_handler
### input_notifier
